problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: Combining Bacteriophage surface display for targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
